title: Projects & Case Studies
text:
Welcome to my portfolio of academic and professional projects. Below are examples of how I apply data-driven analysis and structured management frameworks to solve complex business problems.


1. Health Insurance Cross-Sell Prediction
(Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics)



Health Insurance Cross-Sell Prediction



The Challenge: An insurance provider needed to identify which existing health insurance customers would be interested in purchasing vehicle insurance.
My Role & Solution: I built and evaluated classification models including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost using Python and the scikit-learn library.
Methodology: I applied advanced feature engineering techniques to clean and prepare the dataset for predictive modeling.
The Results: Successfully improved predictive accuracy by optimizing key performance metrics, specifically focusing on the ROC-AUC and F1 Score.




2. Smart Kitchen Renovation & Automation
(Project Management)



Smart Kitchen Project Overview



The Challenge: To plan and manage a comprehensive smart kitchen renovation within an 8-week timeframe and a strict $15,000 budget constraint.
My Role & Solution: I acted as the Project Manager, developing a Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) and Organizational Breakdown Structure (OBS) aligned strictly with PMI principles.
Methodology: Created a detailed project schedule, established a robust cost baseline, and maintained a comprehensive risk register using ProjectLibre.
The Results: Successfully simulated the management of scope, time, cost, and risk to deliver the project requirements without exceeding the $15,000 budget.




3. Benevento Foods Quality & Operations Analysis
(Business Strategy & Operations)



Benevento Foods Analysis



The Challenge: Benevento Foods was experiencing operational inefficiencies and required a strategic overview to improve quality and output.
My Role & Solution: I conducted a comprehensive analysis of their operational performance using structured business frameworks.
Methodology: Utilized data interpretation techniques to identify bottlenecks and map out process improvement opportunities.
The Results: Delivered actionable recommendations designed to enhance operational performance and support informed business strategy.
